author: matkt0
content: I tried last week and have some ideas, but this will take some time. If it's not too much work for you, I would prefer that you send the FCU again. I'll try to work in the background on a solution that works. I'll let you know when we have something so you can return to your new behavior.

author: jtraglia
content: <@&1417820113981145228> please take some time to review / approve [the pull request for eip7688](https://github.com/ethereum/consensus-specs/pull/4630) before acdt. Hoping to merge it today.
